message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "QuerySet" as QS
participant "QueryParser" as QP
participant "Tokenizer" as T
participant "Query" as Q
participant "QueryComponent" as QC

User -> QS: 1 QuerySet()
User -> QS: 2 add("longitude", "*/CLON")
QS -> QP: 3 parse(queryString)
activate QP
QP -> T: 4 tokenize(queryString)
activate T
T --> QP: 5 tokens
deactivate T
loop [all sub-queries]
    QP -> Q: 6 Query()
    activate Q
    loop [all components]
        QP -> QC: 7 QueryComponent()
        activate QC
        QP -> Q: 8 push_back(component)
        deactivate QC
    end
    deactivate Q
end
QP --> QS: 9 queries
deactivate QP
@enduml
